info.description: The Selling Partner API for FBA Inventory lets you programmatically retrieve information about inventory in Amazon's fulfillment network.
info.title: Selling Partner API for FBA Inventory

post.description: Requests that Amazon add items to the Sandbox Inventory with desired amount of quantity in the sandbox environment. This is a sandbox-only operation and must be directed to a sandbox endpoint. Refer to [Selling Partner API sandbox](https://developer-docs.amazon.com/sp-api/docs/the-selling-partner-api-sandbox) for more information.

parameters.name: x-amzn-idempotency-token
parameters.description: A unique token/requestId provided with each call to ensure idempotency.

parameters.name: addInventoryRequestBody
parameters.description: List of items to add to Sandbox inventory.

400.description: Request has missing or invalid parameters and cannot be parsed.

403.description: Indicates access to the resource is forbidden. Possible reasons include Access Denied, Unauthorized, Expired Token, Invalid Signature or Resource Not Found.

404.description: The specified resource does not exist.

429.description: The frequency of requests was greater than allowed.

500.description: An unexpected condition occurred that prevented the server from fulfilling the request.

503.description: Temporary overloading or maintenance of the server.

InventoryItems.description: List of Inventory to be added

AddInventoryRequest.description: The object with the list of Inventory to be added

ErrorList.description: A list of error responses returned when a request is unsuccessful.

code.description: An error code that identifies the type of error that occurred.

message.description: A message that describes the error condition in a human-readable form.

details.description: Additional information that can help the caller understand or fix the issue.

Error.description: An error response returned when the request is unsuccessful.

errors.description: One or more unexpected errors occurred during the AddInventory operation.

AddInventoryResponse.description: The response schema for the AddInventory operation.

InventoryItem.description: An item in the list of inventory to be added.

sellerSku.description: The seller SKU of the item.

quantity.description: The quantity of item to add.
